chunks.text: Soda 5A Switch Downtime, May 11 and 17 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Soda 5A Switch Downtime, May 11 and 17 There will be an emergency network downtime. We will replace network hardware for soda 5a swi

. We will replace network hardware for soda 5a switch on Wed morning May 11, 2005. There will be brief network outages from 7:30AM to 8AM. This will affect users who use wired connection on the 5th floor. Since our wireless network feeds into our swi

oor. Since our wireless network feeds into our switched infrastructure at several locations in Soda, there will also be a couple of brief outages to the wireless network from floors 5-7 as well. UPDATE [2005-05-16 23:58:49 | Janet Shu, EECS Networks

E [2005-05-16 23:58:49 | Janet Shu, EECS Networks] We will run diagnostics on the Soda Alpine 5A switch on Tuesday morning, May 17, 2005. There will be brief network outages from 7AM to 8AM. This will affect users who use wired connection on the 5th

l affect users who use wired connection on the 5th floor. Since our wireless network feeds into our switched infrastructure at several locations in Soda, there will also be a couple of brief outages to the wireless network from floors 5-7 as well. We

o the wireless network from floors 5-7 as well. We regret any inconvenience this may cause. Please make your plans accordingly. Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outa
